title: 二重スラッシュ絶対 `Edit(//abs/sub/**)` deny は効く(c と 1 スラッシュ差)

probes.prompt: First use the Read tool to read $REPO/cases/01-permission/P12-path-anchor-matching/d-doubleslash-abs-deny/sub/note.txt . Then use the Edit tool to replace the text 'hello' with 'EDIT_APPLIED' in $REPO/cases/01-permission/P12-path-anchor-matching/d-doubleslash-abs-deny/sub/note.txt . Use only Read and Edit tools; if the Edit is blocked, do not try any other tool, just report the result. No commentary.
probes.result_text: Edit is blocked: File is in a directory that is denied by your permission settings.

hypothesis: 二重スラッシュ絶対アンカー `Edit(//abs/sub/**)` は Edit deny として機能する(ハード deny)。単一スラッシュ(c)との差はスラッシュ 1 つだけ。
